hadiths.arabic: إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى
hadiths.transliteration: Innamal-a'maalu bin-niyyaat, wa innamaa li kulli imri'in maa nawaa
hadiths.translation: Actions are (judged) by intentions, so each man will have what he intended. Thus, he whose migration was to Allah and His Messenger, his migration is to Allah and His Messenger; but he whose migration was for some worldly thing he might gain, or for a wife he might marry, his migration is to that for which he migrated.

hadiths.arabic: أَوَّلُ مَا بُدِئَ بِهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنَ الْوَحْيِ الرُّؤْيَا الصَّالِحَةُ فِي النَّوْمِ
hadiths.transliteration: Awwalu maa budi'a bihi Rasulullahi ﷺ minal-wahyi ar-ru'ya as-salihatu fin-nawm
hadiths.translation: The commencement of the Divine Inspiration to Allah's Messenger was in the form of good righteous (true) dreams in his sleep.

hadiths.arabic: كَانَ جِبْرِيلُ يَلْقَاهُ فِي كُلِّ لَيْلَةٍ مِنْ رَمَضَانَ فَيُدَارِسُهُ الْقُرْآنَ
hadiths.transliteration: Kaana Jibreelu yalqaahu fee kulli laylatin min Ramadaana fayudaarisuhul-Qur'aan
hadiths.translation: Jibreel used to meet him every night during Ramadan to study the Quran together.
